Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Technijian custom GSD skills, agents, workflows, and runner

23 custom commands \(SDLC pipeline, code generators, review tools\),
7 custom agents, 17 workflow files, and gsd-runner.ps1 for automated
phase execution. Includes cross-platform install scripts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add sync.ps1 and update gsd-runner.ps1 with CI loop improvements

sync.ps1: Syncs custom skills from ~/.claude/ into the repo for
distribution. Detects new, updated, and orphaned files. Supports
-AutoCommit and -Push flags.

gsd-runner.ps1: Updated with continuous improvement dry-run preview,
enhanced CI summary with iteration history, and improved logging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
